review_text: Great place.Heaven on Earth.Great place to wet a line on the banks of lake Eucumbene. Great friendly Service always there to help.It’s also dog friendly which helps.
Lovely staff lovely location is a fishing villa.

First time here, the location is great. Right on the doorstep of the great lake. Didn't use any of the facilities because we didn't need to. Perhaps the only thing that would be awesome is a direct connection to the boat ramp. But understand why it's not.
A very well loved caravan park than needs a bit of love. Close to the mountains.
Location was great but service and room wasn't
Excellent  place close to the snow or bring the boat to go fishing
Been there a few times .the staff at the park are always friendly and accommodating. Park is spotless . Goi g back up soon.
Great place to stay with family nice and peaceful at a good price

Where to start…the lake is spectacular the dust bowl not so much. We had an en-suite site but was probably the worst en-suite we’ve encountered thus far, was cleanish but the clean looks like it was done some time back as cobwebs everywhere, had to clean the toilet before using it and, after a couple of flushes, a frog appeared in the bowl, still don’t know where it came from? Couldn’t work out the light in the en-suite, took numerous attempts (5mins)  to get it to work on day one and then gave up on day two. The German Wasps also made things interesting as soon as you cracked a beer or brought food outside.
Some rooms are not good.

I had a great experience booking with Polly – she was incredibly helpful in accommodating our request for a 1-day stay, even though the website mentioned a 2-day minimum. We reserved two tent spots, which were more than spacious enough for our group of 8 adults, 1 child, and a dog.

The amenities were well-maintained and conveniently located, with power sockets and water readily available at the tent spots. The location was perfect, offering breathtaking sunrise views and a chance to enjoy fishing at the dam lake, where the water was beautifully crystal-clear.

I recently stayed at this caravan park and had a fantastic experience. The showers and toilets were exceptionally clean, which made our stay very comfortable. The staff were incredibly friendly and always ready to help with a smile. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a pleasant and hassle-free stay.
Close to the Lakes edge. Very serene in the off season. We camped with our camper trailer.
Great stay in the bunk house, great kitchen, toilets separate, great showers.
Great place and the current publican ( Kerry ) is a great old fella
Nice little park to unwind and enjoy your time

Beautiful location, the sunset was spectacular! The showers and toilets were immaculate!, so clean and fresh! We had a very relaxing stay. We stayed in our own caravan. Wish we could stay longer. Thank you 🙏🏻
Dirty and run down cabins. Absolute rip off. Avoid.

We looked around other parks nearby for our 3 month stay on powered site but the manager Polly was just so friendly and welcoming we knew this was the right place. Polly will go out of her way to make sure visitors are comfortable. The amenities are very pleasant, modern and clean. The views are breathtaking.  Very peaceful, friendly and welcoming community of permenant residents, very well maintained throughout. Great walking tracks, heaps of wildlife and perfect if you love to fish.
Been here many times camping and in cabins.. great location and amenities
Staff very friendly and helpful. Views amazing, quite place, amenities very clean although little far from our caravan siite. Fishing walking distance.
Nice clean place, $39 for a 1 night, off peak, non powered site.
Ross and Tanya Thankyou for a great week. We stayed an extra 3 days. We had our caravan.Beautiful peaceful spot.  Great fishing. The amenities are spotless We will be back.

We stayed at this fabulous caravan park on the shore of lake eucumbene . What a relaxing holiday with many trout caught . The amenities were spotless and the hospitality of the managers Ross and Tania was exceptional. We can thoroughly recommend this campsite to all who require a peaceful holiday . The food at the adaminaby snow goose hotel 15 k from the caravan park was exceptional value and servings were huge and well presented. We had the Sunday roast for $15.00 and we are told the parmas are huge . The road to old adaminaby was tar sealed and in great condition.

Great location.
Friendly customer service.
Good camping location powered or unpowered sites.
Very good heated amenities.

We stayed in a cabin and it was clean and well organised.  The manager in the office was very friendly and upon arrival she provided us the relevant details and was kind enough to answer all our queries.  Overall it was a great stay and look forward for more holidays at this caravan park.

Spent three weeks on a powered caravan site. Beautiful location and met the new managers Ross and Tanya who were very friendly and helpful. Facilities first class. Looking forward to a return trip soon.
Rooms nice tidy and clean, heated beds were amazing, communal toilets clean (nice and fresh, heated too , boiling water which i love & shower pressure amazing). Coming back for sure
